title: Cruel Remake
description: New dimention, New ore, New weapons
body:
This Mod add ores, weapons,  dimention and armors.

If you want “Ancient Spirit”, right click on “Treasure Bag [Cruel King]”.

Treasure Bag [Cruel King]” is dropped by Cruel King.

To meet the “Cruel King”, you need to create a gate with “Cruel Catarist”, open the gate with “Awaking Flame”, and then find the structure with “Cruel Dimention”.

You can fight the “Cruel King” by dedicating a “Cruel Eye” to the block in the middle of the structure

 

"Your journey is just the beginning."
